title: Master of Engineering Management (English) Mission and Vision
content:
Master of Engineering Management (English) Mission and Vision

Mission

To enable individuals with a bachelor's degree in engineering to take a more active role in the managerial and operational decisions of businesses in different sectors by providing them with the ability to produce scientific solutions for the problems they will encounter in engineering systems, and to improve processes and systems.

Vision

Building the managerial knowledge and skills required by enterprises and other organizations specialized in Engineering on basic engineering knowledge, helping the development, production and dissemination of technology and gaining international recognition in the field of Engineering Management
